briefing:
## 🌍 Top 5 Global Fintech News

- **[Fintech founder charged with fraud; AI app found to be humans in the Philippines](https://techcrunch.com/2025/04/10/fintech-founder-charged-with-fraud-after-ai-shopping-app-found-to-be-powered-by-humans-in-the-philippines/)** — *Hacker News* — A fintech founder faces fraud charges after their supposedly AI-powered shopping app was revealed to be operated by human workers in the Philippines.

- **[Americans see their savings vanish in Synapse fintech crisis](https://www.cnbc.com/2024/11/22/synapse-bankruptcy-thousands-of-americans-see-their-savings-vanish.html)** — *Hacker News* — Thousands of Americans lost access to their savings following the collapse of fintech middleware firm Synapse, raising serious questions about consumer protection in banking-as-a-service models.

- **[Fintech is making credit cards weirder](https://workweek.com/2022/08/05/fintech-is-making-credit-cards-weirder/)** — *Hacker News* — Fintech innovation is pushing credit cards into increasingly niche and unconventional territory as startups chase underserved segments and novel rewards structures.

- **[Apple acquires UK open banking startup Credit Kudos](https://ffnews.com/newsarticle/apple-acquires-uk-open-banking-startup-credit-kudos/)** — *Hacker News* — Apple has acquired UK-based open banking startup Credit Kudos, signalling the tech giant's ambitions to deepen its foothold in financial data and alternative credit assessment.

- **[Open Banking and Payments Competition](https://www.bitsaboutmoney.com/archive/open-banking-and-payments-competition/)** — *Hacker News* — A deep dive into how open banking frameworks are reshaping competitive dynamics in the payments industry and what that means for incumbents and challengers alike.

---

## 🍁 Top 5 Canadian Fintech News

- **[CVCA and NACO offer competing visions for feds' $750-million venture envelope](https://betakit.com/cvca-and-naco-offer-competing-visions-for-feds-750-million-venture-envelope/)** — *BetaKit* — Canada's two leading venture capital associations are putting forward divergent strategies for how the federal government should deploy its $750-million venture funding commitment, with implications for fintech and tech startups nationwide.

- **[Canada calls screen scraping 'unsecure,' sets Open Banking target for 2023](https://finledger.com/2021/08/09/canada-sets-open-banking-target-for-2023/)** — *Hacker News* — Canada's federal government flagged screen scraping as a security risk and committed to an open banking framework, a foundational move still shaping the country's financial data policy today.

- **[Eight Charts Show 'Rupture' With Canada Under Trump's Tariffs](https://financialpost.com/pmn/business-pmn/eight-charts-show-rupture-with-canada-under-trumps-tariffs)** — *Financial Post* — New data visualizations illustrate the deepening economic rift between Canada and the United States as Trump-era tariffs continue to strain bilateral trade relationships.

- **[How the U.S.-Iran conflict is impacting gas prices in Canada](https://www.cbc.ca/news/business/canadian-gas-prices-us-iran-9.7111371?cmp=rss)** — *CBC Business* — Rising oil prices driven by U.S.-Iran tensions are pushing up fuel costs for Canadians, adding inflationary pressure with potential ripple effects for consumer spending and financial services demand.

- **[Ottawa puts $8.5 million behind 40 Atlantic Canadian AI projects](https://betakit.com/ottawa-puts-8-5-million-behind-40-atlantic-canadian-ai-projects/)** — *BetaKit* — The federal government is investing $8.5 million across 40 AI-focused projects in Atlantic Canada, reflecting growing support for the region's innovation ecosystem.

---

## 🌊 Bonus: Relevant to Atlantic Fintech's Focus (1–3 articles)

- **[Ottawa puts $8.5 million behind 40 Atlantic Canadian AI projects](https://betakit.com/ottawa-puts-8-5-million-behind-40-atlantic-canadian-ai-projects/)** — *BetaKit* — Federal funding for 40 Atlantic Canadian AI projects signals meaningful momentum for the region's tech ecosystem, with potential crossover opportunities for fintech startups leveraging AI in credit, compliance, and financial services.

- **[CVCA and NACO offer competing visions for feds' $750-million venture envelope](https://betakit.com/cvca-and-naco-offer-competing-visions-for-feds-750-million-venture-envelope/)** — *BetaKit* — How Ottawa ultimately structures this $750-million venture commitment could significantly affect the availability of early-stage capital for Atlantic Canadian fintech founders and the broader regional startup ecosystem.

- **[Kraken dives deeper into defence with $615-million Covelya Group acquisition](https://betakit.com/kraken-dives-deeper-into-defence-with-615-million-covelya-group-acquisition/)** — *BetaKit* — Halifax-based Kraken Robotics' landmark $615-million acquisition of the Covelya Group underscores Atlantic Canada's capacity to produce globally ambitious, high-growth tech companies — a signal of confidence in the region's broader innovation trajectory.
